target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive facade destruction and missing windows across multiple floors; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements are heavily damaged, consistent with 45-75% area damage per doctrine.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive facade and window damage across multiple floors; structural framing appears intact; damage covers a large portion of the building's visible area consistent with 45-75% damage threshold.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: The highlighted section shows a two-story building with intact structural framing; visible damage includes broken windows and minor facade damage, consistent with up to 15% of target element area damaged.

summary: Three building targets assessed: one with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE), one with SEVERE damage (CONFIRMED), and one with LIGHT damage (CONFIRMED). The overall scene depicts a multi-story building with extensive facade and window destruction across its central section, flanked by less damaged structures, indicating a focused impact. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for the heavily damaged central building, with partial functionality possible for the adjacent structures.
